title: Common-Bell
body:
Even more simple resourcepack disabling the ringing bell sound by replacing it with a mute one

Mute sound from [Wikipedia](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Short_Silent,_Empty_Audio.ogg)

Need support ? Join the Discord [here](https://discord.gg/H8xZpfscCg)
